title: Musical Wife
subTitle: Women, who are also wives, shouldering different responsibilities in life, participate in a music contest, where their performance is evaluated by judges.

title: Uppum Mulakum
subTitle: Balachandran and Neelima, who face many challenges to earn a living, aim to successfully fulfil their wish of going to a foreign country.

title: Mahalakshmi
subTitle: Mahalakshmi faces the consequences of her stepfather's actions with strength, while Kannan, who survives an unexpected tragedy, becomes her unexpected support in a journey of survival.

title: Sukhamo Devi
subTitle: Devika is in love with Nandagopan, but Karthikeyan forces her to marry him. She elopes with Nandagopan only to get abandoned by him at the temple, which leads her to marry his friend.

title: Flowers Comedy Ith Item Vere
subTitle: Comedians take the stage and perform hilarious skits, showcasing their talent and attempting to impress the judges, in order to win the competition.
